Learning Curves and Diagnostics

Loss Curves by Stage

Lower validation loss with a narrowing train-vs-val gap suggests better generalization; widening gaps indicate potential overfitting in later epochs/stages.

mAP Curves by Stage

Upward mAP50 and mAP50-95 trends indicate improving detection quality; plateaus or drops suggest diminishing returns or instability.

Validation KPI by Stage

Higher localization recall and class accuracy indicate stronger real-world detection and classification reliability across stages.
